title: BigBear.ai (BBAI) Stock Forecast and Price Target 2026
text: BigBear.ai (BBAI) stock forecast and price target analysis for 2026. The stock price forecast for the next 30 days is generally positive, with an average analyst price target of $7.1141, representing a +76.53% increase from the current price of $4.03. The highest analyst price target is $7.4166, and the lowest is $6.8117. BBAI has a market cap of $2.1B with a 52-week high of $9.39 and a 52-week low of $3.01. The BigBear.ai Holdings stock holds buy signals from both short and long-term Moving Averages giving a positive forecast for the stock.
